first_run.rationale: The change in employer names from potentially smaller/startup companies to more generic corporate names had no effect on the evaluation. The score remained identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both versions. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the model's assessment of the candidate's qualifications for the role.
